**CFE**
**ខេមបូឌាន ហ្វែរវីន អ៊ិនធើប្រាយ ខមភេនី លីមីធីត**
**CAMBODIAN FAIRWIND ENTERPRISES COMPANY LIMITED**
Room 906-907, 9th Floor, Exchange Square, Street 106, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia
Tel: 0855-8123 3601 email: com.fairwind@gmail.com
[redacted]

**Fire Safety Compliance Report – CFE Ref: 20/[redacted]**

**Background**
[redacted] had a commercial tower recently completed by the contractor [redacted]. The site consists of a [redacted] tall office block on [redacted], Phnom Penh. During the design period, LBL was aware of the Building Design Code - Fire Safety Systems (The Code) that came into force in Cambodia in 2019, the Khmer version of which was launched to the National Seminar at Ministry of Interior Headquarters in August 2019 and in English to the General Public on 9th September 2019.

Cambodia Fairwind Enterprise Company Limited (CFE) is the company that has the contract with the Ministry of Interior of Cambodia establishing 5 National Centers for Fire Safety and standards. They are: The National Quality Inspection Center for Fire Equipment (NICE), The National Quality Inspection Center for Fire Safety Systems (NICS), The National Fire Academy of Cambodia (NFAC), The National Fire Engineering Institute (NFEI) and The National Fire Hazard Investigation and Data Management Centre (NFID). Each Center has its own Prakas issued by the Ministry of Interior which is delegated with special duties in Fire Safety aspects. Since August 2019, they are responsible for every aspect of fire safety and the primary tool for ensuring compliance to the Fire Code referred to herein. The 5 Centres are managed by the General Commissariat of National Police (GCNP) and operated by CFE.

CFE were engaged by [redacted] to produce this assessment report following study of the design drawings and responses to queries, with conditional pre-acceptance for obtaining of Final Fire Certificate from GCNP, as required in Cambodia.

**ទំព័រទី ១៦៩ នៃ ១៧៦**
